Class TibberApiClient

java.lang.Object
com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.client.TibberApiClient
public class TibberApiClient extends Object
Client for interacting with the Tibber GraphQL API.

This client handles authentication and execution of GraphQL queries against the Tibber API. For more information about the Tibber API, see: Tibber API Documentation

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TibberApiClient(String accessToken)
    Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token.
    TibberApiClient(String accessToken, okhttp3.OkHttpClient httpClient)
    Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token and HTTP client.

  • Constructor Details

    • TibberApiClient

      public TibberApiClient(String accessToken)
      Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token.
      Parameters:
      accessToken - the Tibber API access token

    • TibberApiClient

      public TibberApiClient(String accessToken, okhttp3.OkHttpClient httpClient)
      Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token and HTTP client.
      Parameters:
      accessToken - the Tibber API access token
      httpClient - the HTTP client to use for API requests

  • Method Details

    • executeQuery

      public com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode executeQuery(String query, Map<String,Object> variables) throws IOException
      Executes a GraphQL query against the Tibber API.
      Parameters:
      query - the GraphQL query to execute
      variables - the variables to include with the query (may be null)
      Returns:
      the JSON response from the API
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during the HTTP request

    • subscribeToLiveMeasurements

      public LiveMeasurementSubscription subscribeToLiveMeasurements(String homeId, SubscriptionHandler handler)
      Creates a subscription for real-time measurement data for the specified home.

      This method establishes a WebSocket connection to the Tibber API and subscribes to real-time measurement data for the specified home. The handler will be notified of connection status changes and incoming measurement data.

      Parameters:
      homeId - the ID of the home to subscribe to
      handler - the handler for subscription events
      Returns:
      a subscription object that can be used to manage the subscription
